title: SharpnessMixin
description: Prevents Sharpness from affecting the Attack Damage tooltip
body:
Prevents the Sharpness enchantment from affecting the Attack Damage tooltip. Sharpness still works, it just won't change the tooltip specifically anymore.

# Why?
Three reasons:
- Consistency with Minecraft Dungeons
- Consistency with Ranged Weapon API's tooltips not being affected by Power
- To give the player a "base" number for weapons in the context of BetterCombat, where different hits of a combo can have their own damage multipliers. It is harder to compare a dagger with a spear if one of them have Sharpness.
